title: Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz Amid US-Iran War Standoff
summary: Iran closes the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global oil shipping corridor, disrupting international maritime trade during ongoing US-Iran conflict.
contents:
## Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz Amid US-Iran War Standoff

### Overview
Iran closes the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global oil shipping corridor, disrupting international maritime trade during ongoing US-Iran conflict.

### Details
Iranian forces block the strait, halting oil tanker traffic and driving fuel prices above $125 per barrel. US President Trump considers military strikes to reopen the route while facing a Friday deadline to end or extend the war. Lawmakers criticize the closure for killing 13 US troops, injuring over 400, and destroying equipment, complicating midterm politics.

### Geographic context
Location: Strait of Hormuz, Persian Gulf.
